fee_detail: No submission or page charges (hybrid); optional OA APC only if chosen

journal: J. of King Saud University — Computer and Information Sciences

note: Broad-scope CS and information sciences. Strongest metrics of the CS additions — use with the flags in mind.

fee_detail: ♦ Diamond OA — no APC (DOAJ, CC BY-NC-ND)

note: Broad mechanical scope (mechanics, tribology, mechatronics) since 1994; CiteScore 6.1.
Rise verified as citation-driven: self-cites ~20/yr, stable ~28 papers/yr. Strongest metrics in the table.

note: Karabuk University's fully-OA engineering flagship, Q1 across seven Scopus categories. Exception entry: Elsevier-published.

fee_detail: ♦ Diamond OA — free to read and publish, costs covered by the RSC

fee_detail: No mandatory fees (hybrid); optional OA APC ~US$2,745 only if chosen
